Champions (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $16,397,335Details
International Box Office $2,718,743
Worldwide Box Office $19,116,078
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $713,300
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $227,075
Total $940,375
Further financial details...

Synopsis

After a series of missteps, a former minor-league basketball coach is ordered by the court to manage a team of players with intellectual disabilities. He soon realizes that despite his doubts, together, this team can go further than they ever imagined.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$5,148,740 (31.4% of total gross)
Legs:3.18 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:85.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:3,030 opening theaters/3,039 max. theaters, 3.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $17,926,150

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 10th, 2023 (Wide) by Focus Features
International Releases: March 9th, 2023 (Wide) (Australia)
March 9th, 2023 (Wide) (New Zealand)
March 10th, 2023 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
March 23rd, 2023 (Wide) (Peru)
March 23rd, 2023 (Wide) (Trinidad)
Video Release: April 28th, 2023 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for strong language and crude/sexual references.
(Rating bulletin 2767 (cert #53610), 1/25/2023)
Running Time: 123 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Foreign-Language Remake, Remake
Filming location (country): Canada
Plot point: Basketball, Community Service, Inspirational Coach, Learning Disabilities
Subgenre: Sports Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Focus Features, Gold Circle Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
